prior_verdicts.note: Superseded by this plan - prior verdict scoped only dashboard build

three_q.caveat: Mixed reasoning (extract+build+synthesize) is inherent to ML pipeline projects; anti-pattern clause prevents phase multiplication

decomposition.detect_patterns_finding: etl/data are most common needs (5 each); latade/lacouncil most used capabilities (7 each); prior Hard Rule #2 violation on artifact paths
decomposition.anti_pattern_note: Linear pipeline is one lifecycle, not three tasks - temporal signal does not multiply phases

tasks.name: Data Ingestion
tasks.description: Load 7 OULAD CSVs from data/oulad/ into DuckDB bronze layer via latade MCP

tasks.name: ETL Pipeline
tasks.description: bronze->silver (dedup, type cast)->gold (aggregated features) via latade medallion pipeline

tasks.name: DQ Baseline Checks
tasks.description: 6 DQ checks: null profiling, column existence, type validation, duplicate detection, target balance, range/bounds

tasks.name: Feature Engineering
tasks.description: Merge 7 CSVs on student_id+code_module+code_presentation; engineer temporal VLE click features

tasks.name: Model Evaluation
tasks.description: Accuracy, precision, recall, F1, confusion matrix, feature importance analysis

gap.description: laecon capability is BASIC (not STABLE). MCP server functional but workflows less validated.
gap.mitigation: Use laecon MCP for model training; fallback to direct scikit-learn in src/main.py if MCP tools fail

tasks.name: Dashboard Build
tasks.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with model conclusions, feature importance chart, simulation sliders, responsive layout

critical_gates.gate: DQ checks must pass before ML pipeline
critical_gates.action_on_fail: Stop pipeline, surface gap to user

critical_gates.gate: Model must achieve baseline accuracy before dashboard
critical_gates.action_on_fail: Review feature engineering, consider different model

risks.description: Previous DataMission failure - noisy dataset produced no predictive signal
risks.mitigation: OULAD is Nature Sci. Data validated; DQ checks (T3) gate ML pipeline

risks.description: laecon BASIC status - less battle-tested MCP workflows
risks.mitigation: Fallback to direct scikit-learn; gap acknowledged with TTL=2

risks.description: Artifact path violation risk - detect_patterns found prior Hard Rule #2 violations
risks.mitigation: All artifacts to child repo, never LAOS projects/ path

risks.description: Dataset merge complexity - 7 CSVs with many-to-many relationships
risks.mitigation: T2 documents merge strategy, handles cardinality explicitly

capability_gaps.description: laecon capability is BASIC (not STABLE). MCP server exists and is functional, but workflows and validation patterns are less mature than STABLE capabilities.
capability_gaps.affects: Task Group B (T4-T6): ML pipeline tasks including feature engineering, model training, and evaluation

gaps_acknowledged.gap_summary: laecon BASIC status affects ML pipeline quality; mitigated by fallback to direct scikit-learn
